narrative:
Precinct Eldorado Village (precinct in Preble County) has 321 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
